'''Vaas Ga''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Vaas Ga was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], achieving the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] by the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The war, a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy-spanning]] conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], saw Master Ga pushed into the role of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the newly created [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Placed in command of [[Sarlacc Battalion A]] and [[Sarlacc Battalion B|B]] of the [[41st Stormtrooper Legion|41st Elite Corps]], he saw battle on many fronts.<ref name="RCTZ" />

During the war, Master Ga and his troops were assigned to take the planet [[Dinlo]], working closely with [[Senior clone commander|Senior Clone Commander]] [[Gree (clone trooper)/Legends|Gree]]. Overwhelmed during the [[Skirmish at Dinlo|fighting]], Ga and his men were rescued by General [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] and the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of [[Improcco Company]] during the skirmish. While looking a little worse for wear, Master Ga did not sustain severe injuries during the costly battle and returned to Coruscant for new orders.<ref name="RCTZ" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
